purpose: M0/A3 immutable FieldLab evidence catalog: every run folder classified as gold, valid, negative, historical, or superseded.

classes.gold: Directly backs the validated hash-recorded P7 baseline or another currently-validated claim.
classes.valid: Completed successfully and still supports a current claim; not the promoted baseline evidence.
classes.negative: Records a failure, blocked, or refuted result; retained as immutable negative evidence.
classes.historical: Era-bound evidence from an earlier phase; retained but not load-bearing for current claims.
classes.superseded: Claim re-proven by the named newer run of the same or stronger scenario.
